rationale: This supervisor prioritizes safe, efficient exploration by preferring forward motion in clear conditions, using deterministic obstacle escape policies, and employing helper states for atomic actions. Only one controllable is enabled per state (except obs_front, which may allow both rotate and scan for recovery). Uncontrollable events are fully handled in all states. Helper states ensure one-shot actions and prevent oscillations. The policy avoids direct reversals and ensures recovery after encountering obstacles.
strategy: Prefer forward movement in clear state for efficient coverage.
On obstacle_front, perform a full 360-degree scan to find a new direction (scan_full).
On obs_left, rotate clockwise to escape left-side obstacles.
On obs_right, rotate counterclockwise to escape right-side obstacles.
Helper states (forward_commit, rotate_commit_cw, rotate_commit_ccw, scan_full) ensure one-shot actions and return to perception/decision states.
All uncontrollable events are handled in every state to ensure safety and determinism.
No oscillatory behavior: only one escape direction is enabled per obstacle state.
After recovery or scan, always return to clear or appropriate perception state before resuming motion.
No direct move_forward from obs_front; always require recovery first.
Systematic exploration is achieved by resuming forward motion whenever possible.
